upgrade.name: Atlas snapshot unlock toast
upgrade.summary: Added a bottom-corner achievement notification that announces the newest completed outcome when a refreshed snapshot contains an unseen unlock.

research.takeaway: Toasts work best as brief, immediate, non-blocking feedback for completed events.
Game-style unlocks commonly use compact dark cards, glow, rarity color, and motion.

research.source: Grid Sage Games achievements UI design
research.takeaway: A game should provide its own visible achievement interface, not only external platform notifications.
Notifications should remain non-intrusive and readable during a short display window.
Passive, non-urgent notifications fit a small nonmodal popover pattern.

implementation: Inserted a fixed aria-live unlock toast container in web/index.html.
Added latest outcome comparison against browser-local last-unlock memory in web/app.js.
Reused Trophy Room medal sprites, lane art, XP, and tier logic for the toast.
Added dismiss and Open Trail actions without introducing external services or build tooling.
Added responsive toast styling, animation, and cache busting in web/styles.css and web/index.html.
Documented the storage key and standalone behavior in web/README.md.
